response.justification: Bogdan has deep, broad engineering experience across distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and multiple languages including Python-adjacent ecosystems (Node.js, TypeScript), with clear ownership and operational history — but his resume lacks explicit evidence of AI-native code generation workflows, LLM integration, or recent Python mastery, which are baseline expectations for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Proven ownership across full stack, operations, and tooling (CI/CD, GitLab, on-call readiness implied)
Strong track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Python as a primary language or AI-driven code generation experience
Resume spans 30+ years with many outdated tech stacks; recent AI/ML exposure is implied but not demonstrated
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder stakeholder collaboration in Berlin-based team
